name: macOS Tool Calling UI
description: Tests tool calling settings on macOS: open Settings → navigate to AI Features tab → verify tool calling toggle → verify agent skills toggle → verify MCP server add button → dismiss settings. Validates tool calling UI elements are present without executing tool calls.

steps.description: Wait for settings sheet to appear.
Navigate to the AI Features tab.
Verify the tool calling toggle exists.
Enable tool calling so MCP section renders.
Wait for MCP section to appear after enabling tool calling.
Verify the thinking mode toggle exists in AI Features.
Verify the Add MCP Server button exists.
